actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / WZ g2 bare-to-low-scale running bridge not derivable on current PR230 surface

bridge_contract.required: same-source SU(2)xU(1)/Higgs lattice action with gauge kinetic normalization
accepted bare electroweak coupling boundary condition in that action
same-surface relation between lattice cutoff/renormalization scale and the physical readout scale
field content and threshold ordering for running from the bare scale to readout scale
scheme and finite matching constants for converting action coupling to g2(v)
no observed values, package alpha/plaquette/u0/R_conn, H_unit, Ward, or unit normalizations

conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if a future same-source EW action, accepted bare coupling boundary condition, scale ratio, threshold content, finite matching scheme, and forbidden-import firewall certificate are supplied
exact_next_action: Supply a same-source EW action and strict non-observed g2 running/matching certificate with scale ratio, threshold content, finite matching scheme, and firewall fields, then rerun the electroweak g2 builder, W/Z mass-fit row builder, assembly, retained-route, and campaign gates.
forbidden_inputs_checked: observed g2, observed W/Z mass, observed top mass, or observed y_t
alpha_LM / plaquette / u0 / R_conn package coupling authority
SU(2) generator/Casimir normalization as physical g2

parent_statuses.electroweak_g2_builder: open / electroweak g2 certificate builder inputs absent
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.matching_running_bridge: open / PR230 matching-running bridge awaits certified physical input
parent_statuses.retained_closure_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.wz_g2_authority_firewall: exact negative boundary / WZ response g2 authority absent for PR230
parent_statuses.wz_g2_generator_casimir_no_go: exact negative boundary / SU2 generator-Casimir normalization does not certify PR230 g2
parent_statuses.wz_g2_response_self_normalization_no_go: exact negative boundary / WZ response-only g2 self-normalization no-go
parent_statuses.wz_mass_fit_response_row_builder: open / WZ mass-fit response-row builder inputs absent
parent_statuses.wz_same_source_ew_action_gate: exact negative boundary / same-source EW action not defined on PR230 surface

proposal_allowed_reason: The current PR230 surface has structural SU(2) beta-function and bare-coupling candidates, but no same-source EW action, scale ratio, threshold/matching scheme, or strict g2 certificate.  The low-scale g2 changes under unprovided running and finite-matching data.

running_and_matching_counterfamily.counterfamily_interpretation: The same structural bare coupling and one-loop beta coefficient produce different low-scale g2 values when the unprovided scale ratio or finite matching shift is changed.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained PR230 closure
does not write the strict electroweak g2 certificate
does not import observed g2, W/Z/top/y_t values, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, R_conn, H_unit, or Ward authority
does not treat g2^2=1/4, beta-function names, SU2 Casimir data, or package g2(v) as proof authority
does not set c2=1, Z_match=1, or kappa_s=1
